content: [AVOID] When consuming diff-ranking artifacts in the Dark Factory code-review gate, do NOT replace review_diff.txt with the ranked assembly. code_review_payload.py's changed_lines() anchors reviewer findings to RIGHT-side line numbers using the raw unified diff; replacing it with a reordered/summarized assembly breaks line-number anchoring and silently demotes inline PR comments to off-diff findings. The ranked assembly replaces only the $DIFF_CONTENT passed to the reviewer subagent prompt; the raw unified diff must still be written to review_diff.txt.
